allow: gh pr merge <number> --merge --delete-branch is pre-authorized ONLY when the PR head branch starts with chore/docs-roadmap-. These are documentation-only PRs created by the /roadmap skill. The skill cuts a fresh branch off main, edits only product-build-status-roadmap-content.md and/or ARCHITECTURE.md, pushes, opens a PR, merges, and returns to the original branch — no code paths are touched. Before merging, verify the head branch matches this prefix via gh pr view <number> --json headRefName. Code PRs using any other branch prefix are NOT covered and MUST still pause for the Bree-confirms-on-Vercel-preview gate documented in CLAUDE.md.

gh pr create --base main --head chore/docs-roadmap-* is pre-authorized as part of the same /roadmap skill ship flow. Other gh pr create invocations (code PRs) are not covered and use the normal review flow.
